title: Iran Will Be in U.S. for World Cup, FIFA’s Infantino Says
summary_full: The comments come as peace talks between Iran and the United States have not yet resumed and a cease-fire is set to expire next week.
summary_public: The comments come as peace talks between Iran and the United States have not yet resumed and a cease-fire is set to expire next week.
